mapper.sql: id, draft_id, trace_id, request_id, action_type, operator_id, operator_name, target_type, target_id, published_version, task_id, outbox_event_id, before_status, after_status, action_result, error_code, error_message, remark, created_at
mapper.insert: insert into content_publish_log ( draft_id, trace_id, request_id, action_type, operator_id, operator_name, target_type, target_id, published_version, task_id, outbox_event_id, before_status, after_status, action_result, error_code, error_message, remark, created_at ) values ( #{draftId}, #{traceId}, #{requestId}, #{actionType}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{publishedVersion}, #{taskId}, #{outboxEventId}, #{beforeStatus}, #{afterStatus}, #{result}, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage}, #{remark}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: select from content_publish_log where draft_id = #{draftId} order by created_at desc, id desc
select from content_publish_log where trace_id = #{traceId} order by created_at asc, id asc
